auth.title: Your team, your metrics, one screen.
auth.lead: TalentManager brings employees, hours, performance and blockers into one clear space. Make faster decisions with real data.
auth.employeesText: Create people, assign them to teams and measure performance.
auth.reportsText: Daily log, monthly closings and executive briefs.
auth.supportText: Capture team blockers and follow them as tickets.
auth.loginLead: Enter and review your team's pulse.
auth.registerLead: Set up your company in under a minute and start managing talent.

dashboard.title: Your company pulse, in real time.
dashboard.lead: A view of talent health: how many people you have, how their hours are going, how much they generate and where to focus this week.
dashboard.inputHint: Sum of income captured in the daily log
dashboard.trendHelp: This series answers a simple question: how many hours were invested and how much income was recorded each month.
dashboard.readTitle: The green line is money; the orange line is effort.
dashboard.readText: If income rises without hours rising much, the team was more efficient. If hours rise and income does not, review load, blockers or opportunity quality.
dashboard.trendEmptyTitle: The trend appears when daily records exist
dashboard.trendEmptyText: Go to Reports, save workdays with income and hours, and this panel will show monthly productivity evolution.
dashboard.teamsEmptyText: When you register employees and workdays, teams will appear here with their completion.
dashboard.insightsEmptyText: There are no automatic suggestions yet. Register workdays to feed the engine.
dashboard.supportOpenText: Resolving these blockers can improve hours, completion and report quality.
dashboard.contributorsTitle: Revenue, cost and margin per person
dashboard.contributorsHelp: Top 5 employees by billed revenue across the last 6 months. Margin is revenue minus cost (the company default applies when an employee has no individual rate).
dashboard.contributorsEmptyText: Once you set hourly rate and hourly cost in Settings or per employee, this panel will show real profitability.
dashboard.marginRateExplanation: The percentage shows how much of revenue is kept as margin (revenue - cost). Higher = more profitable.
dashboard.targetExplained: Target is {{hours}} h per month (configurable in Configuration).

reports.title: Executive reports
reports.lead: Reports does not create employees or invent data: it turns a person's daily log into an automatic monthly closing and then into an editable executive decision.
reports.step1Text: Hours, income and daily score by employee.
reports.step2Text: The app automatically groups the month's records.
reports.step3Text: The report summarizes evidence and leaves a management action.
reports.needEmployee: You need at least one employee
reports.needEmployeeText: Reports uses your directory. Create people and then come back here.
reports.dayHelp: Select the date and entry / exit times. Worked hours are calculated automatically and feed the monthly closing.
reports.duplicatePrefix: There is already a record for this person on this date
reports.duplicateSuffix: Saving will update that workday instead of creating another one.
reports.createReportHelp: Search a person, review the monthly closing and save an actionable decision.
reports.noEmployeeResults: No employees matched that text. Adjust the search or create the person in Employees.
reports.monthlyHint: Record workdays first; the monthly closing is calculated automatically.
reports.noWorkdays: This person has no workdays yet. Save at least one daily record to enable the report.
reports.autoTitlePlaceholder: Autofills when you choose a closing
reports.contentHint: Editable: add context, agreements or follow-up.
reports.noReportsText: There are no saved reports yet. Create one from the form to start the history.

support.title: Team blockers and requests
support.lead: Each ticket follows a clear flow: pending, in progress and resolved. Use this queue to remove blockers that affect hours, completion and reports.
support.requestHelp: Describe what is happening, who it affects and what is needed to unblock it.
support.ticketPlaceholder: Example: QA cannot validate reports because staging has been down since yesterday...
support.minChars: Describe the blocker with at least 12 characters.
support.queueHelp: Use the visible states to move every ticket to resolved.
support.emptyText: When you register a request it will appear here and you can move it to resolved.

employees.title: Employees and teams
employees.lead: Create the people in your company, assign them to a team and keep the directory up to date. Everything else is built on this list.
employees.editHelp: Change the fields you need and save.
employees.createHelp: You only need role and team to start.
employees.rolePlaceholder: Example: Senior engineer, Designer, Support L1
employees.noMatchesText: No employees match the selected search or team.
employees.emptyText: Create the first one with the form and the team will appear here.
employees.compensationHelp: If left at 0, the company default is applied.

settings.title: Company configuration
settings.lead: Define how your company operates: expected hours that drive the completion target, the currency used for KPIs, and the per-hour rates that feed revenue, cost and margin automatically.
settings.operationsHelp: These values define the monthly hours target (completion) and the currency used across KPIs.
settings.currencyHint: Applied across all KPIs and reports
settings.currencyChangeWarning: We'll update the currency code to {{currency}}. Historical values are not converted: only the symbol used to display them changes. You can switch back to {{previous}} anytime and your data stays intact.
settings.compensationHelp: When an employee has no rates set, these defaults are used to compute revenue, cost and margin automatically.
settings.defaultHourlyRate: Hourly rate (what you bill the client)
settings.rosterHelp: Each employee can have their own rate. Leave it at 0 to fall back to the defaults above.
settings.rosterEmpty: No employees yet. Create at least one to configure compensation.
settings.marginPreviewHint: Rate - Cost (zero when either is missing)
settings.noBilling: No active rates: the dashboard will show 0 until you define them.

profile.title: User profile
profile.lead: Account info and security options. Change your password without losing the session.
profile.passwordHelp: For security we need your current password before applying the new one.
profile.passwordError: Could not change password. Check your current password.
profile.passwordMismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
